text:
Final Call is a digital single by Yoko Takahashi. The single was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE with the catalog number NOPA-2435, it was released on 20 December 2021. https://vgmdb.net/album/117095 It was featured in the soundtrack of the Neon Genesis Evangelion ~Roar to the Future~ pachinko machine.

Tracklist

Staff

Composition: Masaya Wada
Lyrics: Yoko Takahashi
Arrangements: Masaya Wada, MANABOON Sagisu
Vocals: Yoko Takahashi

References
